race.comment: SIR ATLAS (3) has always had his share of talent and strikes what is probably the most winnable race he's been in for a while. Ran up to some good trials with a nice first-up fourth at Cranbourne, better for that, will appreciate the extra trip and has twice won second up. HEAVENLY EAGLE (6) has also run well in better races and comes off a 2.25-length fourth at Caulfield. Should be nearing peak fitness now and while he's only won one at around this trip, he's run top three in 10 of 15 starts. HIS FINEST HOUR (5) was a big winner of the Hanging Rock Cup and drops in trip here but has won his only start at the track. FOX APPEAL (4) was disappointing last start, but any one of the previous four runs would give this a shake so he deserves another chance from the good draw. Similarly, HELLBERG (9) ran below expectations when 14th and beaten 11 lengths over 1400m at Albury last start but did little wrong his previous four starts and draws to advantage.
